name: openmasjidstudentmanager
description: OpenMasjid Students — a self-hosted, madrasa-first school-management app (SIS, gradebook, exams, report cards, transcripts, admissions and tuition billing) that runs as an OpenMasjidOS app.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @openmasjid/students-web && npm run build -w @openmasjid/students-server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @openmasjid/students-server && npm run lint -w @openmasjid/students-web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @openmasjid/students-server --if-present && npm run test -w @openmasjid/students-web --if-present
